title: Bridge Essay: EcoMeditation Modifies Brain Resting State Network Activity.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**EcoMeditation Modifies Brain Resting State Network Activity.** — Innov Clin Neurosci. PMID: 36204165. DOI:. The tendency of the mind to wander, acharacteristic of the brain'sdefault mode network (DMN), correlates with increased unhappiness and self-referential processing and is adeterrent to establishing aconsistent meditation practice. The objective of this study was to test the impact of asecular physiological method of meditation. We hypothesized that EcoMeditation would produce increases in neural communication in brain regions associated with compassion and prosociality and decreases in self...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 7 (Emptiness). Evaluation: Good (score=2.3)
